strengths: High-throughput distributed systems background (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency microservices with async I/O)
Emerging agentic-AI exposure at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, showing relevant directional pivot
Fintech adjacency through RIDE Capital (investment platform, TDD/CI discipline) and Optilyz (pricing optimization with complex configuration modeling)
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership: entire career is IC (Staff/Senior developer); no evidence of hiring, growing, or managing an engineering organization of any size

Multi-agent AI experience is shallow and recent — current role mentions agentic tooling but no evidence of production multi-agent systems with financial consequences, real-time inference, or evaluation pipelines at scale
No fintech infrastructure depth in credit systems, payment flows, real-time credit-risk modeling, or regulated-environment compliance — the core operational domain of this role
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile IC engineer with strong distributed-systems fundamentals and a recent pivot toward agentic tooling, but the resume shows no evidence of engineering leadership, team scaling, or executive-level ownership — all hard requirements for this CTO role. His fintech exposure is tangential rather than deep, and his AI work appears to be infrastructure tooling rather than production multi-agent systems operating under financial or regulatory constraints. The role demands a leader who has already built and run engineering organizations at scale in high-stakes AI/fintech environments; Bogdan does not yet meet that bar.
